# Tables

This section is driven by `catalog/tables.csv`. Assessment tables can be added
as CSV files under `tables/` or `Tables/` using the names listed in the
catalog. Pipeline bookkeeping files are kept with the render outputs for audit
purposes but are not shown as report tables unless they are explicitly added to
the catalog.

```{r table-catalog, echo=FALSE, results='asis', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
table_catalog <- read_catalog("tables")
table_curation <- read_table_curation()
table_roots <- report_paths("table_roots", c("pipeline-inputs", "tables/generated", "tables", "Tables"))
emit_catalog_tables(table_catalog, roots = table_roots, curation = table_curation, placements = "main")
emit_curated_file_tables(table_curation, catalog = table_catalog, roots = table_roots, placements = "main", default_section = "Curated generated tables")
curated_table_catalog <- apply_table_curation(table_catalog, table_curation)
appendix_table_catalog <- filter_catalog_tables(curated_table_catalog, placements = "appendix")
if (nrow(appendix_table_catalog)) {
  cat("\n# Appendix: Curated Supplemental Tables\n\n")
  emit_catalog_tables(appendix_table_catalog, roots = table_roots, placements = "appendix", empty_todo = FALSE)
}
emit_curated_file_tables(table_curation, catalog = table_catalog, roots = table_roots, placements = "appendix", default_section = "Curated supplemental generated tables")
emit_extra_generated_tables(
  table_catalog,
  roots = report_paths("extra_table_roots", c("tables/generated")),
  curation = table_curation
)
```
